procedure:
Customer Request Acknowledgment with Mandatory Actions

When responding to any customer request, you MUST complete both the message reply AND the two required ticket updates.

Send this acknowledgment message:
"Hi {{ticket.requester.first_name}},

Thank you for contacting us. I've received your request and will be handling it personally. I'm reviewing the details
now and will investigate the best solution for you.

If you have any additional context, screenshots, or details that might help, please share them in your reply.

I'll keep you updated on my progress.

Best regards,
{{agent.first_name}}"

REQUIRED: Set ticket priority to High
REQUIRED: Set ticket status to In Progress

data.comment: Hello, I recently tried to use a digital coupon from my Kroger account during checkout, but it did not apply to my order. I made sure the coupon was clipped and the items matched the coupon requirements. Can you please help me resolve this issue and ensure I receive the discount? Thank you.
data.suggestedMessage:
Hi William,

Thank you for contacting us. I've received your request and will be handling it personally. I'm reviewing the details now and will investigate the best solution for you.

If you have any additional context, screenshots, or details that might help, please share them in your reply.

I'll keep you updated on my progress.

Best regards,  
Jinfan
data.suggestedMessageRationale: Matches the required acknowledgment message exactly and is appropriately generic.
